programme.title: Capítulo 153
programme.desc: José kisses Teo after revealing her feelings; though he's unconscious. Giovanni reveal he knows where all the records of the Lodge are kept; him, Miguel, and Diego try to retrieve them but get caught by the Lodge. Gandia finds out Pilar is apart of the Lodge but vows to protect her. Rodrigo sets the basement on fire, trapping the guys. Franco finds out Mia is in the band. Roberta and the others convince Gandia to rescue the guys.

programme.title: Capítulo 154
programme.desc: Roberta saves the Lodge files from burning; she gives them to Gandia. Gandia tells Mendiola the Lodge exists and is ordered to get rid of the evidence. Mia tells Miguel what Viviana did. Gandia and Mendiola plan to blame everything on Giovanni. Alma has decided to never bother Roberta again. Miguel confront Viviana about the letter; he breaks up with her. Teo and his father reconnect.

programme.title: Capítulo 155
programme.desc: Alma refuses to talk to Roberta. Giovanni is blamed for everything concerning with the Lodge and expelled; the other students demand justice and Roberta threatens to tell all. Gustavo and Marcia, decide it's better for Gustavo to have custody of Teo. Gandia punishes the students for protesting. Franco punishes Mia unjustly. Teo confronts José about saying she was his girlfriend. Rodrigo kidnaps Roberta for her interference; Diego ditches school to go find her.

programme.title: Capítulo 156
programme.desc: Rodrigo tries to attack Roberta but Diego saves her. León demands that all the Lodge members be taken to prison. Carlo finds Alma a performance opportunity in New York. José leaves the hospital after being found out by Teo.

programme.title: Capítulo 157
programme.desc: As vacation nears, Diego and Tomás forgive Giovanni and invite him to go with them.Giovanni's father tells him not to come home. Miguel is asked by Franco to keep watch over Mia during vacation. Mia, Vico, and Celina plan a vacation. Roberta, Lupita, and José plan a vacation. Mia tells Alma she's dating Gastón. Alma convinces Franco to let Mia stay in the band.

programme.title: Capítulo 158
programme.desc: The anonymous gossip column is all about Mia and Gastón. Teo and José are set up by Roberta and Lupita. Giovanni is given his own apartment. Gandia sees the gossip column and gives it to Franco, who flies into a rage. While Franco is threatening Gastón, Miguel jumps in and says he's dating Mia. José refuses to let her feelings for Teo show.

programme.title: Capítulo 159
programme.desc: Vacation planning continues for everyone; In the end, all twelve has Canada as their destination. Gastón is angry when Mia tells him that her and Miguel will be going to dinner with her dad. Madariaga tells Giovanni he'll help him get back into Elite Way School. Celina has lost weight. Valeria tells Franco Mia and Miguel's relationship is a lie; she secretly invites Viviana; Mia punches her.

programme.title: Capítulo 160
programme.desc: Mía reproaches Miguel for dating Viviana again. Gastón catches Mía and Miguel kissing and becomes furious. Valeria and Viviana come up with a plan to expose Mía and Miguel, but it backfires. The group enjoy Canada. Roberta, José, and Lupita run into Pilar. Alma decides to leave Mexico. Mayra, Lupita's aunt, speaks to Nico's mom.

programme.title: Capítulo 161
programme.desc: Mia and Diego, Miguel and Roberta, act as sweethearts to make each other jealous. Franco tries to persuade Alma not to leave Roberta by leaving the country; he lies to Valeria about it. The group is welcomed to the Banff Hotel. Teo surprises José with the help of Lupita and Roberta. Pilar keeps up her conniving ways. José refuses Teo's advances.

programme.title: Be My Savior
programme.desc: A teenage girl forbidden by her parents to date is swept off her feet by an older man. They vow to keep their whirlwind romance secret at all costs but when an unplanned pregnancy threatens to derail their plans they take drastic action.

programme.title: The Night Shift
programme.desc: A rookie cop struggles to resist temptation when he meets a beautiful exotic dancer while on shift. But he's keeping secrets not just from his sergeants but his new girlfriend too. And he'll stop at nothing to keep his double life secret.

programme.title: Siempre juntos
programme.desc: Drama

programme.title: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A teen girl with big ambitions of becoming a cop falls hard for the charm of an NYPD officer. He promises to make all her dreams come true but when affairs of the heart are complicated by the letter of the law, who will pay the price?

programme.title: Bound by Honor
programme.desc: Love and tradition collide when a young woman forbidden from dating falls for a handsome stranger. She knows she must keep her relationship hidden from her orthodox father and protective brother. But at what price does secrecy come?

programme.title: Married with Secrets
programme.desc: It's love at first sight for Michelle and Dennis. But soon, the dark past of the college student's new husband rears its ugly head and ends in a double homicide.

programme.title: Lone Star Lust
programme.desc: A Texas woman enters into an affair with her daughter's grandfather, causing a major rift in the family and eventually leading to a bloody showdown.

programme.title: Laws of Attraction
programme.desc: A high-flying attorney embarks on an illicit affair with one of his clients, then the secret affair is revealed, and the laws of attraction prove fatal.

programme.title: The Sergeant and the Schoolgirl
programme.desc: When high school senior Michelle Miller joins the Future Soldiers program, she sees it as the first step to realizing her dream of enlisting in the Army. But a forbidden affair with her recruiter risks her career in the Army, and her future itself.

programme.title: Amor a primera vista
programme.desc: Drama

programme.title: Therapy on Ice
programme.desc: When violin prodigy Lia Tricomo seeks the help of therapist John Alkins, they connect over a shared love of music. When John finds it impossible to resist his troubled patient, the consequences of indulging his forbidden passion will prove deadly.

programme.title: Lucha interna: Parte I
programme.desc: Detienen a Doña Lucha al creer que es la jefa de una banda de marchistas, para sacarla de la cárcel, sus hijos juntan sus ahorros con los que comprarían su regalo del 10 de mayo. En la cárcel los policías creen que ella mató a un delincuente.

programme.title: El primo de oro
programme.desc: An very rich, unknown cousin visits the family and spoils them. Of course, the family tries to take advantage.

programme.title: Don Camerino y Lucrecia
programme.desc: Ludovico tells his boss, Don Camerino, about his sister-in-law Lucretia, mistakenly thinking that he is looking for a wife. It turns out that he just wanted a prostitute.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Follows a dysfunctional family in Peluche City.

programme.title: La novia de Ludoviquito
programme.desc: Ludoviquito lleva a su novia a casa para presentarle a su familia, pero después terminan y su familia cree que se quiere suicidar.

programme.title: Brad Pittin
programme.desc: Federica se reencuentra con su exnovio de la preparatoria Nazario, quien es apodado como Brad Pittin por su parecido con el actor; y al ver que es rico y un exitoso escritor, Federica decide estar más tiempo con él.

programme.title: El video de las cochinadas
programme.desc: Ludoviquito quiere entrar a un concurso de los vídeos más estúpidos de la gente y sin querer se lleva un video de sus papás teniendo sexo, por lo que Ludovico y Federica tendrán que recuperar esa cinta.

programme.title: El concurso de reclamos
programme.desc: Ludovico insiste en que Lucrecia entre al "concurso de reclamos" que Federica ganó el año pasado. Don Camerino, al sentirse humillado, obliga a Ludovico a que lleve a su esposa para que Lucrecia no gane el concurso, mas no contaban con que Federica ya no quiere participar. Mientras que a Federica no puede participar en el concurso, ya que le cerraron la boca con el miedo de engordar, le ponen un cierre en la boca para no comer y manda a Ludovico a participar en el concurso disfrazado de Federica.

programme.title: Seminario de celosas
programme.desc: Federica va a un convento asistiendo a un seminario para controlar sus celos; Don Camerino le encarga a Ludovico ir por su sobrina Leonarda al aeropuerto y traerla al convento porque tiene problemas con el alcohol.

programme.title: Los héroes del norte
programme.desc: A country music band from a small Mexican town, created by random bizarre members, strives to achieve fame and fortune.

programme.title: La novia fea
programme.desc: Vítor and Albertano are two decent but very conceited best friends who are going for the same goals: to find good jobs, nice places to live, and true love.

programme.desc: El padre de Lorena regresa con la noticia de que se casó con su enfermera. El Borre y Virginia sacan su app para vender tacos.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: 40 Under 40
programme.desc: When Vanessa (Leah Remini) cuts him out of a magazine article about up-and-coming Long Island business owners, Kevin (Kevin James) discovers she lied about her age in order to be included.

programme.title: Monkey Fist Insecurity
programme.desc: After Kevin and Vanessa nail a pitch for a new job for their security company, Monkey Fist, they run into Frank, the owner of a rival company who is determined to put them out of business by pitting Kevin and Vanessa against each other.

programme.title: Kevin Can Date
programme.desc: Vanessa encourages Kevin to ask out a client who shows interest in him.

programme.title: Wingmen
programme.desc: After Kevin and Vanessa witness Kyle's success using a dating app that requires a close friend to choose one's perfect match, they agree to be each other's wingman and try their hand at matchmaking.

programme.title: The Whole Enchilada
programme.desc: After convincing Kevin to break things off with his neighbor, Wendy, who had reeled him in with her delicious meals, Vanessa feels compelled to cook for him despite being culinarily challenged.

programme.title: Delivery Guy
programme.desc: Vanessa convinces Kevin to go on a TV talk show with the "baby boy" he helped deliver years ago as a cop, but her plan to promote Monkey Fist backfires when Kevin runs into his arch-nemesis, Frank Munson, at the appearance.

programme.title: The Smoking Bun
programme.desc: Kevin and Vanessa devise a plan to save Enzo's restaurant after learning the new owner plans to knock it down; the owner makes them a lucrative job offer, which puts the future of the restaurant in peril.

programme.title: Brew Haha
programme.desc: Kevin offers to help Kendra and Chale buy Enzo's, but they soon realize that the partnership won't work when Kevin's idea of a silent partner is not so silent. As the tension among them escalates, Kendra and Chale find peace at Vanessa's apartment.

programme.title: A Band Done
programme.desc: Ignoring Vanessa’s (Leah Remini) warnings, Kevin (Kevin James) reunites with his old band for a show at Enzo’s.

programme.title: Phat Monkey
programme.desc: When Monkey Fist lands Alviti's big account to provide security for his parking garages, Kevin inadvertently derails Rootger's efforts to study for his security guard test and puts the new job in jeopardy, much to Vanessa's dismay. Also, Kendra and Chale try to persuade an investor to help finance their brew pub idea.

programme.title: Forty Seven Candles
programme.desc: Vanessa thinks she's friendless when none of her pals are available to go to dinner with her on her birthday. Feeling lonely while waiting for Kevin to pick her up for what she thinks is just a dinner for two, Vanessa gets tipsy with Kyle, and the two share a flirtatious moment.

programme.title: Cooking Up A Storm
programme.desc: After Kevin insists he can handle cooking a full Thanksgiving dinner for Vanessa and his family, he realizes he's in over his head and secretly asks his flirtatious neighbor, Wendy (Florencia Lozano), for help.

programme.title: Slip 'N' Fall
programme.desc: After Rootger (Bas Rutten) is accidentally injured at work, Kevin (Kevin James) and Vanessa (Leah Remini) worried about being sued.

programme.title: Trainer Wreck
programme.desc: Kevin (Kevin James) tries to keep a handsome new trainer focused on remaking his body and not dating Vanessa (Leah Remini).

programme.title: The Might've Before Christmas
programme.desc: While Vanessa and the Gable family gather around the Christmas tree, Vanessa and Kevin reminisce about their first patrol together.

programme.title: Fight Or Flight
programme.desc: On a flight for a security job, Vanessa tells a flight attendant that she and Kevin are newly married in order to get bumped up to first class, but her fib creates a lot of extra baggage when Kevin meets Lisa and the two hit it off.

programme.title: 2025: Lions vs. Bears - Week 18
programme.desc: Chicago rallies 16 points in the fourth quarter as the 'Cardiac Bears' attempt to take down the reigning NFC North champion Lions in the regular season finale of the 2025 season.

programme.title: 2025: Packers vs. Cowboys - Week 4
programme.desc: Micah Parsons returns to Dallas for the first time as a member of the Green Bay Packers as they duel against the Dallas Cowboys in a back-and-forth brawl that goes into overtime and ends in a 40-40 tie game.

programme.title: 2024: Commanders vs. Bengals - Week 3
programme.desc: Commanders rookie quarterback Jayden Daniels shined, going 21 of 23 with 254 yards and 3 touchdowns, leading the Commanders to a 38-33 victory over the Cincinnati Bengals. Joe Burrow's 324 yards weren't enough to avoid Cincinnati's 0-3 start.

programme.title: Bills vs. Patriots - Week 15, 2025
programme.desc: The Buffalo Bills rally from a 21-point deficit to beat the New England Patriots 35-31, to stay alive in the AFC East's playoff race.

programme.title: 2024: Cowboys vs. 49ers - Week 8
programme.desc: Brock Purdy bounced back from a shaky first half to lead three touchdown drives in the third quarter and the Niners narrowly avoided another fourth-quarter collapse with a late defensive stand that sealed a 30-24 victory Sunday night.

programme.title: 2025: Patriots vs. Broncos - AFC Championship
programme.desc: Condensed NFL football games.

programme.title: 2025: Rams vs. Seahawks - NFC Championship
programme.desc: Sam Darnold threw 3 touchdowns, the Seahawks' defense came up with a critical fourth-down stop, and Seattle advanced to Super Bowl LX, beating the Los Angeles Rams 31-27 in an electrifying NFC championship game.

programme.title: Chiefs vs. Bills - Week 9, 2025
programme.desc: Josh Allen moves to 5-1 against Patrick Mahomes during the regular season as the 2024 MVP outduels the Kansas City signal caller in a 28-21 victory that came down to the final drive.

programme.title: Seahawks vs. Patriots - Super Bowl LX
programme.desc: The Seahawks dominated the trenches on both sides of the ball as their defense dropped Drake Maye for six sacks and their offense rushed for 141 total yards behind Kenneth Walker III's MVP performance in a 29-13 Seattle victory.

programme.title: Bengals vs. Ravens - Week 10, 2024
programme.desc: Baltimore Ravens quarterback Lamar Jackson had 3 fourth-quarter touchdown passes, and the Ravens stopped the Cincinnati Bengals on a two-point conversion with 38 seconds remaining to hold them 35-34 on Thursday night.

programme.title: Eagles vs. Cowboys - Week 12, 2025
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott threw 2 touchdown passes, ran for the tying score and led the drive to Brandon Aubrey's 42-yard field goal as time expired as the Cowboys beat the Philadelphia Eagles 24-21 in a mistake-filled thriller Sunday.

programme.title: 2024: Bills vs. Rams - Week 14
programme.desc: Matthew Stafford passed for 320 yards and found wide receiver Puka Nacua for a 19-yard touchdown with 1:54 to play, and the Rams overcame Josh Allen's three touchdown passes and three touchdown runs to snap the Bills' seven-game winning streak.

programme.title: 2025: Packers vs. Bears - NFC Wild Card
programme.desc: It was the Bears' biggest postseason comeback in franchise history, which was capped by DJ Moore's 25-yard touchdown from Caleb Williams with just 1:48 to go in regulation.

programme.title: Titans vs. Raiders - Week 6, 2025
programme.desc: The Las Vegas Raiders set the tone in the first half, when they shut out the Tennessee Titans. It was the first time Las Vegas has blanked an opponent in a half since the second half against New Orleans last Dec. 29.

programme.title: Buccaneers vs. Panthers - Week 16, 2025
programme.desc: Carolina Panthers quarterback Bryce Young throws 2 touchdowns, and the Panthers finally beat the Tampa Bay Buccaneers 23-20 to take over first place in NFC South.

programme.title: 2025: Jaguars vs. Texans - Week 10
programme.desc: Davis Mills leads an improbable 19-point comeback in the fourth quarter as the Texans rally to beat Trevor Lawrence and the Jaguars in a 36-29 upset victory.

programme.desc: Chicago rallies 16 points in the fourth quarter as the 'Cardiac Bears' attempt to take down the reigning NFC North champion Lions in the regular season finale of the 2025 season.

programme.title: 2025: Lions vs. Bears - Week 18
programme.desc: Chicago rallies 16 points in the fourth quarter as the 'Cardiac Bears' attempt to take down the reigning NFC North champion Lions in the regular season finale of the 2025 season.

programme.title: 2025: Packers vs. Cowboys - Week 4
programme.desc: Micah Parsons returns to Dallas for the first time as a member of the Green Bay Packers as they duel against the Dallas Cowboys in a back-and-forth brawl that goes into overtime and ends in a 40-40 tie game.

programme.title: 2024: Commanders vs. Bengals - Week 3
programme.desc: Commanders rookie quarterback Jayden Daniels shined, going 21 of 23 with 254 yards and 3 touchdowns, leading the Commanders to a 38-33 victory over the Cincinnati Bengals. Joe Burrow's 324 yards weren't enough to avoid Cincinnati's 0-3 start.

programme.title: Bills vs. Patriots - Week 15, 2025
programme.desc: The Buffalo Bills rally from a 21-point deficit to beat the New England Patriots 35-31, to stay alive in the AFC East's playoff race.

programme.title: 2024: Cowboys vs. 49ers - Week 8
programme.desc: Brock Purdy bounced back from a shaky first half to lead three touchdown drives in the third quarter and the Niners narrowly avoided another fourth-quarter collapse with a late defensive stand that sealed a 30-24 victory Sunday night.

programme.title: 2025: Patriots vs. Broncos - AFC Championship
programme.desc: Condensed NFL football games.

programme.title: 2025: Rams vs. Seahawks - NFC Championship
programme.desc: Sam Darnold threw 3 touchdowns, the Seahawks' defense came up with a critical fourth-down stop, and Seattle advanced to Super Bowl LX, beating the Los Angeles Rams 31-27 in an electrifying NFC championship game.

programme.title: Chiefs vs. Bills - Week 9, 2025
programme.desc: Josh Allen moves to 5-1 against Patrick Mahomes during the regular season as the 2024 MVP outduels the Kansas City signal caller in a 28-21 victory that came down to the final drive.

programme.title: Seahawks vs. Patriots - Super Bowl LX
programme.desc: The Seahawks dominated the trenches on both sides of the ball as their defense dropped Drake Maye for six sacks and their offense rushed for 141 total yards behind Kenneth Walker III's MVP performance in a 29-13 Seattle victory.

programme.title: Bengals vs. Ravens - Week 10, 2024
programme.desc: Baltimore Ravens quarterback Lamar Jackson had 3 fourth-quarter touchdown passes, and the Ravens stopped the Cincinnati Bengals on a two-point conversion with 38 seconds remaining to hold them 35-34 on Thursday night.

programme.title: Eagles vs. Cowboys - Week 12, 2025
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys quarterback Dak Prescott threw 2 touchdown passes, ran for the tying score and led the drive to Brandon Aubrey's 42-yard field goal as time expired as the Cowboys beat the Philadelphia Eagles 24-21 in a mistake-filled thriller Sunday.

programme.title: 2024: Bills vs. Rams - Week 14
programme.desc: Matthew Stafford passed for 320 yards and found wide receiver Puka Nacua for a 19-yard touchdown with 1:54 to play, and the Rams overcame Josh Allen's three touchdown passes and three touchdown runs to snap the Bills' seven-game winning streak.

programme.title: 2025: Packers vs. Bears - NFC Wild Card
programme.desc: It was the Bears' biggest postseason comeback in franchise history, which was capped by DJ Moore's 25-yard touchdown from Caleb Williams with just 1:48 to go in regulation.

programme.title: Titans vs. Raiders - Week 6, 2025
programme.desc: The Las Vegas Raiders set the tone in the first half, when they shut out the Tennessee Titans. It was the first time Las Vegas has blanked an opponent in a half since the second half against New Orleans last Dec. 29.

programme.title: Buccaneers vs. Panthers - Week 16, 2025
programme.desc: Carolina Panthers quarterback Bryce Young throws 2 touchdowns, and the Panthers finally beat the Tampa Bay Buccaneers 23-20 to take over first place in NFC South.

programme.title: 2025: Jaguars vs. Texans - Week 10
programme.desc: Davis Mills leads an improbable 19-point comeback in the fourth quarter as the Texans rally to beat Trevor Lawrence and the Jaguars in a 36-29 upset victory.

programme.title: 2025: Lions vs. Bears - Week 18
programme.desc: Chicago rallies 16 points in the fourth quarter as the 'Cardiac Bears' attempt to take down the reigning NFC North champion Lions in the regular season finale of the 2025 season.
